title: NeverRespawning.jar
description: A mod adds entities and structures after your death
body:
###             NeverRespawning.jar 

This mod is a story horror mod that only starts when the player dies.

Something is broken, something thats make the player see other clones.

They are in different place, they are in different time, they have different items, but they share memories.

Nobody knows are they can connect each other, but only one anomaly can.

The entity who knows what happens to them, Who's is this thing?, check with yourself.


###     Some things you should read before playing: 

          
-->This is a VERY beta version of the mod, also may it's very short


-->This mod need geckolib to be playable


-->This mod (must) set entities texture as the skin of player (if it not work, tell me in the comments)


-->Mod events only works when a player dies


-->This mod have 3 endings (Maybe it will added more endings and events)


Have Fun!
